description:
IF  cumulative charge throughput exceeds design cycle limit
THEN
  · BMS_SOHEstFault_Flag := 1
  · Trigger SOH re-calibration request

While BMS_CurrSenseFault_Flag = 1:
  · Discharge power limited to 30 % (voltage-based estimation)
  · Charging shall be inhibited
  · IF fault persists for > 5 s
    THEN BMS_SafeState_Entry := 1

While BMS_ChargeTerm_Req = 1:
  · Charge contactor closure shall be inhibited
  · BMS_ChargeReady_Flag := 0
  · Charge termination status shall be broadcast on CAN

While BMS_CellUV_Flag = 1 AND BMS_CellUV_L2_Flag = 0:
  · Discharge power shall be limited proportionally to undervoltage severity
  · IF voltage continues to fall towards 2.50 V
    THEN BMS_CellUV_L2_Flag shall be set

IF  maximum cell temperature delta within pack > 15 C
THEN
  · BMS_TempImbalance_Flag := 1
  · Send DTC P0A0A to VCU

When BMS_SystemState = Standby AND no CAN activity for configurable timeout:
  · Enter low-power sleep mode
  · Quiescent current minimized
  · Wake-up capability shall be maintained (CAN, wake pin)

IF  BMS_ChargeContactor_State = Open AND BMS_DischargeContactor_State = Open
THEN
  · BMS_SystemState := SafeState

IF  BMS_CellOV_Flag = 1 AND charge current already derated to 50 % for >= 1 s
    AND any cell voltage >= r_CellOV_Threshold
THEN
  · BMS_ChargeTerm_Req := 1

Upon BMS_CellOV_Flag = 1, the BMS shall:
  · Broadcast BMS_CellOV_Warn = 1 on CAN ID 0x180 at 100 ms periodicity
  · Reduce charge current target to 50 % of nominal

IF  BMS_CellOV_Detect = 1 for a continuous duration >= t_CellOV_Debounce
THEN
  · BMS_CellOV_Flag := 1
  · Store the maximum cell voltage and affected cell ID in the fault record

Upon VCU_HVConnect_Req = 1 with all preconditions satisfied:
  · Close negative main contactor
  · Enable precharge circuit
  · BMS_SystemState := PrechargeActive

IF  BMS_InsulationFault_Flag = 1 for >= 1 s
THEN
  · BMS_InsulationFault_Latch := 1
  · Store DTC in non-volatile memory
  · HV contactor closure disabled until diagnostic clear

IF  measured pack current deviates from model-predicted current by > 10 %
THEN
  · BMS_CurrSenseFault_Flag := 1
  · BMS_DeratePower_Req := 1

IF  charge current <= 3 A AND max cell voltage >= 4.18 V
THEN
  · BMS_ChargeComplete_Flag := 1
  · Terminate charge session

The following data shall be stored in the fault record upon BMS_CellOV_Flag = 1:
  · Peak cell voltage and affected cell ID
  · Pack temperature at time of fault
  · Event timestamp

After both BMS_ChargeOC_Flag = 0 and BMS_DischargeOC_Flag = 0:
  · Power limit shall be maintained for 2 s hold time
  · Power shall ramp back to nominal at max 10 % per second
  · A new overcurrent event during ramp shall reset the hold timer

The following data shall be logged for each balancing event:
  · Balancing start and end timestamps
  · Cells balanced and discharge duration per cell
  · Cell voltage delta before and after balancing

IF  measured isolation resistance < r_Insulation_MinThreshold
THEN
  · BMS_InsulationFault_Flag := 1
  · Open both main contactors

IF  any cell temperature <= low temperature limit
THEN
  · BMS_CellUT_Flag := 1
  · BMS_ChargeReady_Flag := 0 (charging prohibited)
A current sensor self-test shall be performed during each power-up initialisation. The test shall inject a known reference and verify within 2 % accuracy.
